/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/gui.dir/gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gui.dir/gui/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gui.dir/gui/window.cpp.o -o bin/gui  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.17 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.17 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.17
